name: Triumph Financial Inc. Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 7.125% Series C Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Triumph Financial Inc. Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 7.125% Series C Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock represents preferred equity in Triumph Financial, Inc. These securities offer a fixed dividend rate and rank senior to common stock in the event of liquidation. As a depositary share, it represents a fractional interest in a share of preferred stock held by a depositary.
